text.title: Property-Based Testing with proptest
text.summary: proptest! macro usage, strategy constraints, and run count configuration for invariant verification.

rule.statement: Set at least 256 cases in CI (`PROPTEST_CASES=256`); bump to 1024 for critical invariants like serialization round-trips and parse safety.
rule.rationale: The default 16-32 cases find obvious failures but miss edge cases that appear at higher run counts. Critical paths deserve higher budgets.

rule.statement: Always constrain input strategies (e.g., `0..=1024usize` for byte lengths). Unbounded strategies produce counterexamples that take minutes to shrink.
rule.rationale: Proptest's shrinker minimizes counterexamples after finding them. Without bounds, a 1MB random string found as a counterexample requires extensive shrinking time.

example.note: Two fundamental invariants: round-trip correctness and panic safety on arbitrary input. These catch the most valuable bugs.
